hero.headline: The Cash Generation Platform
hero.description: Billtrust's AI-powered platform automates invoicing, accelerates payments, and eliminates the guesswork from cash flow — so your team can focus on what matters.

pillars.headline: Get paid faster. Every invoice, every channel, every time.
pillars.description: AI-powered invoice delivery and payment acceptance across every channel your buyers prefer — ACH, virtual card, wire, check. One integration, zero friction.
features: Autonomous channel selection trained on $1T+ in payment data
99.7% delivery rate — verified across every rail
Continuous optimization: fewer disputes, faster time-to-pay

pillars.headline: Match every payment. Chase every dollar. Automatically.
pillars.description: Autonomous cash application matches payments to invoices with 99.8% accuracy. AI-prioritized collections ensure no revenue slips through the cracks.
features: Assisted exception handling for edge cases your team controls

pillars.headline: Machine learning that knows who'll pay — and when
pillars.description: Billtrust's predictive models score every receivable by likelihood and timing of payment, trained on cross-network behavioral data no single company could build alone. The system autonomously triggers dunning sequences for routine accounts while surfacing high-risk receivables to an assisted worklist — so your collectors focus only where human judgment moves the needle.
features: Predictive scoring powered by cross-network payment signals
Assisted worklists that surface what needs human attention

moat.headline: Why Billtrust Wins

pillars.label: Pillar One
pillars.headline: Deterministic Software + Autonomous AI
pillars.description: A hardened, rules-based platform handles the deterministic work — invoice delivery, payment processing, compliance checks — while autonomous AI workflows handle the judgment calls: matching, routing, scoring, and prioritization. Where confidence is lower, assisted workflows keep your team in control.

pillars.label: Pillar Two
pillars.headline: The Largest Proprietary B2B Payment Dataset
pillars.description: Every transaction across our network feeds a proprietary dataset no competitor can license or replicate. This data trains every model — from invoice routing to payment prediction to collections scoring — and its accuracy compounds with every dollar processed.
pillars.proofLabel:
In B2B payment data
training our AI models

pillars.label: Pillar Three
pillars.headline: The World's Most Connected B2B Payments Engine
pillars.description: Billtrust connects 2,400+ suppliers to 100M+ buyers across every AP portal, payment rail, and procurement network. This isn't just reach — it's a network effect: every new connection makes the entire platform smarter, faster, and harder to compete with.
pillars.proofLabel:
Buyer connections across
every major payment rail

moat.connector: Three layers of compounding advantage that no competitor can replicate.

network.headline: The Network Effect
network.description: Every new connection makes every existing connection smarter. Billtrust's payment network is the largest in B2B — and it's accelerating.

testimonials.headline: Trusted by the teams that run finance

featured.quote: Our DSO dropped 12 days in the first quarter — and it stayed down.
featured.name: Sarah Johnson

supporting.quote: We had 47 AP portal logins. Now we have one. My team went from managing connections to actually collecting cash. The rollout was straightforward — no six-month implementation nightmare.
supporting.name: Michael Rivera

supporting.quote: Same-day cash posting, every day — that's not a sales pitch, it's what actually happened. We close faster, our AR aging is always clean, and I trust the numbers when I walk into a board meeting.
supporting.name: Amanda Liu
supporting.role: Director of AR Operations, Food Services

cta.headline: Ready to unlock your cash?
cta.description: See how Billtrust turns receivables into certainty.

footer.tagline: The cash generation platform. Intelligent software, proprietary data, and the world's largest B2B payments network.
